import requests
try:
    r = requests.post\('http://127.0.0.1:5000/api/chat', json={'message': '你好'}, timeout=60\)
    print\('Status:', r.status_code\)
    print\('Body:', r.text[:500]\)
except Exception as e:
    print\('Error:', e\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(PYTHONUTF8=1 python -c "
import requests, time
start = time.time\(\)
r = requests.post\(
    'https://api.siliconflow.cn/v1/chat/completions',
    headers={
        'Authorization': 'Bearer sk-xkontskaaylyqeshfuqvtmagqixvpvxgdnpptkqhdyxwbqtw',
        'Content-Type': 'application/json'
    },
    json={
        'model': 'Qwen/Qwen3-8B',
        'messages': [{'role': 'user', 'content': '有哪些产品推荐？'}]
    },
    timeout=120
\)
elapsed = time.time\(\) - start
print\(f'Time: {elapsed:.1f}s'\)
print\(f'Status: {r.status_code}'\)
data = r.json\(\)
if 'choices' in data:
    print\(f'Response: {data[\\"choices\\"][0][\\"message\\"][\\"content\\"][:200]}'\)
else:
    print\(f'Error: {r.text[:500]}'\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(PYTHONUTF8=1 python -c "
import requests, json
r = requests.post\('http://127.0.0.1:5000/api/chat',
    json={'message': '你好，请问你们有什么产品', 'session_id': 'test_ls'},
    timeout=200\)
print\(f'Status: {r.status_code}'\)
data = r.json\(\)
print\(f'Response: {json.dumps\(data, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2\)[:500]}'\)
" 2>&1)
